1|SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = 1042
2|SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = 1042 AND x = 1099
1|SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = 1042 LIMIT 42
1|SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = 1042 OFFSET 42
0|SELECT * FROM t FETCH FIRST 42 ROWS ONLY
1|SELECT 1042 FROM t AS 42
2|UPDATE t SET col = 1042 WHERE id = 1007
3|DELETE FROM t WHERE id IN (1042, 1007, 1099)
1|SELECT * FROM t WHERE name = 'alice_new'
2|INSERT INTO t (id, name) VALUES (1042, 'alice_new')
1|SELECT table42 FROM t WHERE id = 1042
0|SELECT * FROM t -- WHERE id = 42 (commented out)
1|SELECT * FROM t /* WHERE id = 42 */ WHERE y = 1099
2|SELECT '1042' FROM t WHERE id = 1042
1|SELECT $$string with 42$$ FROM t WHERE id = 1042
2|SELECT * FROM t WHERE id BETWEEN 1007 AND 1042
2|WITH cte AS (SELECT id FROM t WHERE id = 1042) SELECT * FROM cte WHERE id = 1099
1|SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = 1042 ORDER BY id LIMIT 7 OFFSET 99
2|SELECT * FROM orders WHERE cust_id = 1042 AND status = 'alice_new'
1|UPDATE orders SET price = 42.99 WHERE id = 1007
1|DELETE FROM t WHERE "column 42" = 1042
0|SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = -42
2|SELECT * FROM t WHERE a = 1042 AND b > 1007
2|SELECT * FROM t WHERE x = 1042; SELECT 1099
1|SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = 1042 FOR UPDATE
1|SELECT * FROM t WHERE id = 1042 FOR SHARE SKIP LOCKED
2|INSERT INTO t (id) VALUES (1042) ON CONFLICT (id) DO UPDATE SET id = 1099
1|SELECT * FROM t JOIN u ON t.id = u.id WHERE t.x = 1042
1|SELECT 1042 AS id FROM t
1|SELECT * FROM t HAVING COUNT(*) > 1042
